chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. S- 154 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge Haring of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 31-07-2023. Mr. Ajay Kumar, Advocate along with both petitioners. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ******* 1. Deferred. 2. Both petitioners are present with their counsel. It is inter alia contended that petitioner No.1 contracted marriage with petitioner Ghulam Akbar and such copy of affidavit of freewill as Annex-A at page-21, Nikahnama as Annex-A/1 at page-23 are annexed with the petition along with copy of order passed in Crl.Misc. Application No.2020 of 2021, passed by Additional Sessions Judge, Mirwah and FIR in Crime No.25 of 2023 and charge-sheet are annexed along with petition. It is further stated that the petitioners before invoking the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court approached the Court of Additional Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace, Mirwah in aforementioned Crl. Misc. Application and copy of order was sent to the respondents No.2 and 3 without specific directions. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the police failed to provide protection to the petitioners and they have life threats. After service of notice, respondents No.2&3 have submitted their reports/comments and respondent No.2 mentioned that he has issued strict directions to SHO, P.S, Mirwah to provide legal protection to the petitioners whenever they approach for the same. SIP Muhammad Jameel on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and Inspector Muhammad Bachal Qazi, SHO, P.S, Mirwah present in Court are directed to ensure the protection to both the petitioners strictly in accordance with law.

After service of notice, respondents No.2&3 have submitted their reports/comments and respondent No.2 mentioned that he has issued strict directions to SHO, P.S, Mirwah to provide legal protection to the petitioners whenever they approach for the same. SIP Muhammad Jameel on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and Inspector Muhammad Bachal Qazi, SHO, P.S, Mirwah present in Court are directed to ensure the protection to both the petitioners strictly in accordance with law. Consequently, with above directions instant petition stands disposed of. J U D G E Ahmad
